---

**Simulating how satellite orbits weave across telescope skies.**

---

`skyweaver` is a python framework for simulating satellite orbits and how they weave tracks across telescope beams

- trace **ground tracks** across Earth  
- produce **sky tracks** as seen by observatories  
- segment into **above-horizon passes**  
- accumulate **HEALPix sky coverage maps**


---

`skyweaver` is designed to install cleanly with a single invocation of the standard python package tool:

```bash
pip install skyweaver
```

Here are some essential project links:

- [Home page and documentation](https://skyweaver.readthedocs.io/en/latest)
- [Installing skyweaver](https://skyweaver.readthedocs.io/en/latest/guides/install)
- [Getting started with skyweaver](https://skyweaver.readthedocs.io/en/latest/guides)
- [skyweaver package on PyPI](https://pypi.org/project/skyweaver)
- [Issue tracker on github](https://github.com/amanchokshi/skyweaver/issues)
